description: The `WindowsCapability` DSC resource is used to install or remove Windows optional features.
author: Microsoft Corporation

embedded.description: The `WindowsCapability` DSC resource is used to install or remove Windows optional features.

Name.title: Name
Name.description: The name of the Windows capability to manage. This is a key and mandatory property.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description:
Specifies whether the capability should be installed (`Present`) or removed (`Absent`).
        Defaults to `Present`.

embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/WindowsCapability
